name: QA 444
description:
PCP QA Test No. 444

pmid and desc caching in pmevent



Copyright (c) 2011 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 444.out.bad)
4,5c4,5
< pmRegisterDerived: register metric[0] event.flags = anon(PM_TYPE_U32)
< pmRegisterDerived: register metric[1] event.missed = anon(PM_TYPE_U32)
---
> pmRegisterDerived: global metric[0] event.flags = anon(PM_TYPE_U32)
> pmRegisterDerived: global metric[1] event.missed = anon(PM_TYPE_U32)
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 564f0d2de60c -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 564f0d2de60c -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 564f0d2de60c -f simple.numfetch
